[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 110101011 6
1 100001000 2
2 011001101 5
3 101011111 7
4 110101011 6

6 100011110 5
7 011111111 8
